mapper.sql: id, task_id, bucket_name, object_key, detection_type, status, porn_label, porn_score, porn_confidence, politics_label, politics_score, politics_confidence, terrorism_label, terrorism_score, terrorism_confidence, ad_label, ad_score, ad_confidence, is_aigc, aigc_confidence, aigc_tool_type, risk_level, action_taken, error_message, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content_detection_record WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM content_detection_record WHERE detection_type = #{detectionType} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM content_detection_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM content_detection_record WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_detection_record ( task_id, bucket_name, object_key, detection_type, status, porn_label, porn_score, porn_confidence, politics_label, politics_score, politics_confidence, terrorism_label, terrorism_score, terrorism_confidence, ad_label, ad_score, ad_confidence, is_aigc, aigc_confidence, aigc_tool_type, risk_level, action_taken, error_message ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{detectionType}, #{status}, #{pornLabel}, #{pornScore}, #{pornConfidence}, #{politicsLabel}, #{politicsScore}, #{politicsConfidence}, #{terrorismLabel}, #{terrorismScore}, #{terrorismConfidence}, #{adLabel}, #{adScore}, #{adConfidence}, #{isAigc}, #{aigcConfidence}, #{aigcToolType}, #{riskLevel}, #{actionTaken}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.update: UPDATE content_detection_record SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE content_detection_record SET status = 'SUCCESS', risk_level = #{riskLevel}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_detection_record WHERE created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY)
